rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF CHRISTOPHER KYLE COATS
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responsed To From Interrogatories And Request For Monetary Sanction.
rulings.Rulings: Arnold's Amended Motion to Compel Further Responses to Form Interrogatories is Granted. Bianco shall file a further response to the Form Interrogatories which removes the general objection. The further response shall state whether the medical records, in their entirety support Bianco's contentions, or shall identify the specific pages of the medical records which support his contentions. Further response due 20 days from 10/31/13. Prevailing party to prepare the order. The request for sanctions is Denied. Any party who contests the tentative and wishes to argue the matter must contact the court (415-551-3702) and opposing counsel by 5:00 p.m. on 10/30/2013.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER SECOND AMENDED AND RESTATED, HAROLD E. KORF TRUST, DECEASED
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel The Veterans Administration To Produce Records
rulings.Rulings: Petitioner's Motion to Compel the Veteran's Administration to Produce Records is GRANTED. Prevailing party to prepare order. Any party or counsel who objects to the tentative ruling must notify the court (415-551-3702) and opposing counsel no later than 5:00 p.m. on 10/30/13. Entered by SKH for reviewing Judge.
